addons.title: Add-on Catalog
addons.sub: Add-ons connect metadata providers, subtitle libraries, and your own streaming sources to your library. Official add-ons are metadata and subtitle providers only; community add-ons are third-party and installed by you, at your discretion.

cfg.preview_empty: No rows selected — your home screen stays empty.

footer.disclaimer: STREDIO hosts no video files and stores no media on its servers. The catalog shows descriptive metadata only; any playable sources come from third-party add-ons you install, and your browser connects to them directly.
legal.title: Legal & Takedown Policy
legal.disclaimer_body: STREDIO is a personal media library and browser. It does not host, store, upload, cache, or proxy any film or series video files, and its servers never transit media. When you play something, your browser connects directly to a source supplied by a third-party add-on that you chose to install. STREDIO does not control, endorse, or take responsibility for those add-ons or the content they make available. Catalog metadata, cover art, and translations shown here are descriptive information only and are not the copyrighted media itself.
legal.privacy_body: STREDIO does not log your IP address or keep server-side request logs. The only data stored against your account is what the service needs to run and sync across your devices — your email, an encrypted password (or your Google sign-in identifier), your watchlist, continue-watching positions, and add-on preferences. We show no ads and run no third-party trackers, and we never sell or share your personal data. A single first-party cookie keeps you signed in. To display catalog metadata and Georgian translations we send the title or search term you request to our providers (TMDB and Google Translate) — never your identity. Your installed add-ons are contacted directly by your browser, not by our servers, so we never see what you stream. You can delete your account at any time to remove your data, or contact takedown@stredio.com to exercise any privacy right.
legal.takedown_body: If you are a copyright owner (or an agent authorised to act on their behalf) and believe that an add-on surfaced through STREDIO points to material that infringes your rights, we will act on a valid notice and promptly remove the relevant add-on or reference from STREDIO.
legal.takedown_list_intro: To help us act quickly, please include the following in your notice:
legal.takedown_l1: Identification of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed.
legal.takedown_l2: The exact link or page on STREDIO that points to the material.
legal.takedown_l3: Your contact details (name, organisation, email, and physical address).
legal.takedown_l4: A statement that you have a good-faith belief the use is not authorised by the rights owner, its agent, or the law.
legal.takedown_l5: A statement that the information in your notice is accurate, and that you are the rights owner or are authorised to act on their behalf.
legal.takedown_note: Because STREDIO does not host the underlying files, removing a link from our index does not delete the file from the third-party service. To have the file itself removed, the notice must also be sent to the service that actually hosts it.
legal.contact_body: Send takedown notices and legal enquiries to:
legal.contact_note: We aim to review valid notices within a few business days.
modal.no_imdb: No IMDb id available for this title, so installed stream addons can't be queried. Showing demo streams.
modal.no_stream_addons_html: No stream add-ons installed. Install a streaming add-on on the Add-ons page to pull sources. Showing demo streams below.
modal.no_sources: Your {addons} installed stream addon(s) returned no sources for this title.
modal.creator: CREATOR
addons.community_disclaimer: These add-ons are created by independent community developers. Stredio is not responsible for third-party add-on content.
streams.catalog_only_sub: Stredio is a media catalog and interface. Install a community streaming add-on to pull playable sources from third-party platforms.
sources.none: No playable sources available for this item right now.
sources.signin: Sign in and install a streaming add-on to play sources.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
player.cant_play: ✕ This file can’t play in the browser
player.cant_play_sub: Many .mkv files use codecs browsers can’t decode. Pick a 1080p .mp4 source from the ⚙ Quality menu, or use “↗ Open in” for an external player.
player.no_audio_hint: ⊘ No audio — this source’s codec (AC3/DTS) isn’t supported. Try another source (⚙) or ↗ Open in a player.
player.seek_buffering: ◷ Still buffering — can’t skip past the loaded part yet.
player.try_lang: No source for this language plays with sound in-browser — try the other language tab, or ↗ Open in a player.
addon.upcoming.desc: Adds the "Upcoming Movies & Series" marquee on the home screen — the 10 most-anticipated unreleased titles with posters, ratings and trailers. Self-refreshing: once a title is released it drops out and the next most-wanted takes its slot.
addon.studios.desc: Adds the "Studios" row on the home screen — a rail of major studio logos (Marvel, Pixar, Warner Bros., Disney and more). Tap a logo to browse that studio's full catalogue. Removing it hides the row.
addon.catalog.desc: Adds the Trending & Top-Rated rows on the home screen — Trending Movies, Trending Shows, Top Rated Movies, Top Rated Shows, Trending Anime and Top Rated Anime. Use Configure to check which rows appear; removing the add-on hides them all.
catalog.modal_kicker: pick which rows appear on the home screen
catalog.rows_hint: Check the rows you want to see on the home page.
addon.providers.desc: Adds the streaming-service rows on the home screen — Netflix, Disney+, Prime Video, Apple TV+, Max, Paramount+ and Crunchyroll. Use Configure to check which services appear; removing the add-on hides them all.
providers.modal_kicker: pick which service rows appear on the home screen
providers.rows_hint: Check the services you want to see on the home page.
addon.livetv.desc: 200+ free live TV channels by region
addon.trakt.desc: Sync watch history and lists from Trakt.tv
